primary_flags.summary: Abandonment arc relay delivered in Olivia's voice — the most direct post-coaching relay of the core RF-01 narrative. ROW-7751: 'Olivia has been asking a lot of questions' — setup framing. ROW-7752: 'Last night as we are going to bed she asked why you used to visit everyday and now you barely do.' The abandonment narrative ('used to visit everyday / now you barely do') is delivered not by Melissa in her own voice but through Olivia's reported question. This is structurally the coached-content relay mechanism at ADD-001 Sev-2: the content directly mirrors the active RF-01 abandonment arc thread ('you miss out on seeing her all the time,' RF01-B010-S001 Sep 2023; progressive development through B-012, B-013, B-020). The RF-01 pass notes that this relay is 'structurally suspicious given ROW-6819 coaching admission' — for RF-08, it is classified as a confirmed post-coaching relay. Cross-reference RF-01 ADD-004 (RF01-B022-F002).
exact_quotes: ROW-7751 (Received): 'Olivia has been asking a lot of questions'
ROW-7752 (Received): 'Last night as we are going to bed she asked why you used to visit everyday and now you barely do'
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Coached narrative relay in child's voice: the abandonment arc premise ('used to visit everyday / now you barely do') delivered as Olivia's spontaneous question, consistent with Melissa scripting content for Olivia to deliver or coaching Olivia's framing of Eli's absence.
primary_flags.add004_note: ROW-7752 is the clearest post-coaching manifestation of S003 (B-010, Sep 2023): where S003 documented Melissa speaking about Olivia's schedule in her own voice, ROW-7752 delivers the same abandonment premise in Olivia's reported voice — the coaching mechanism made the relay invisible.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 ACTIVE: 7 signals (S001-S007). S007 is the clearest post-coaching relay of the core abandonment narrative in Olivia's voice.

compound_patterns.description: Abandonment arc relay in Olivia's voice: RF-08 (Olivia scripted to deliver abandonment narrative) + RF-01 ADD-004 (parental alienation content delivered through child's reported speech).

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase A (very low volume — 48 messages). Jan-Feb 2025. S007 is the definitive post-coaching relay instance.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-2 primary flag. ROW-7752 is the dataset's strongest example of the coaching mechanism in action: the abandonment arc premise delivered in Olivia's reported voice. The RF-01 pass already noted this as 'structurally suspicious given ROW-6819' — RF-08 confirms the classification.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-01 ADD-004 compound. ROW-7752 traces directly back to the abandonment arc thread running through S003 (B-010), RF01-B012/B013/B020 — the same narrative delivered across 16 months, progressively refined until it appears in Olivia's own reported words.
